product_overview: A responsive full-stack event management web application that allows users to browse and join events and administrators to manage events and participants through an admin dashboard.
core_goals: Provide a fast, minimal, and scalable event management system with admin and user roles
Allow users to browse published events and join via a simple registration form without authentication
Allow administrators to securely log in, create, edit, publish/unpublish, and delete events and view participants
Deliver a premium, responsive UI with dark/light mode, smooth animations, and mobile-first behavior
Keep a single Node.js server architecture with SQLite for fast local queries and simple deployment

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Secure admin authentication allowing administrators to access the admin dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Receive successful auth and redirect to /admin/dashboard -> See Admin Dashboard

Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email input field with incorrect credentials -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message indicating invalid credentials and remain on /admin/login
Navigate to /admin/login -> Leave email or password field empty -> Click Login button to submit -> See inline validation errors and remain on /admin/login

features.name: List Events (Home)
features.description: Display a list of published events on the home page allowing users to discover events and open details.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View list of events (cards with title, short description, time, location) -> Click event to see details -> Navigate to /event/:id -> See full event details and Join button
Navigate to / -> API returns no events or error -> See empty state message or error notification stating no events available or unable to load events

features.name: Event Details & Join
features.description: Show event full details and let users join an event by submitting a small registration form (no auth required).
user_flows: Navigate to /event/:id -> View event details (title, full description, date/time, min/max users, location, registered users count) -> Fill Full Name field -> Fill Email Address field -> Click Join button -> Receive success modal or toast and see updated registered users count
Navigate to /event/:id -> Fill Full Name field -> Leave Email Address field empty or enter invalid email -> Click Join button -> See validation error for Email Address and remain on /event/:id
Navigate to /event/:id -> Fill Full Name and Email Address fields -> Click Join button -> Server returns error -> See error notification and remain on /event/:id

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview screen with navigation to add/manage events, view participants, and toggle theme or logout.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/dashboard (auth required) -> See dashboard metrics, sidebar, topbar and available navigation links -> Click Add Event in sidebar -> Navigate to /admin/add-event
Navigate to /admin/dashboard without authentication -> Be redirected to /admin/login or see access denied notification

features.name: Add Event
features.description: Form for administrators to create a new event with metadata and publish toggle.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/add-event (auth required) -> Fill Title field -> Fill Description field -> Fill Event Date/Time field -> Fill Minimum Users field -> Fill Maximum Users field -> Fill Location field -> Select Category -> Toggle Publish on -> Click Submit button -> See success confirmation and find the new event listed in /admin/manage-events
Navigate to /admin/add-event (auth required) -> Leave required fields empty or enter invalid values -> Click Submit button -> See inline validation errors and remain on /admin/add-event
Navigate to /admin/add-event (auth required) -> Fill fields correctly -> Click Submit button -> Server returns error -> See error notification and remain on /admin/add-event

features.name: Manage Events
features.description: List of admin events with actions to edit, delete, publish/unpublish and view participants.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/manage-events (auth required) -> View table of events with title, date, published status and action buttons -> Click Edit on an event -> Open edit form/modal -> Update field(s) -> Click Save -> See success confirmation and updated event in the list
Navigate to /admin/manage-events (auth required) -> Click Delete on an event -> Confirm deletion -> API deletes event -> See success notification and event removed from the list
Navigate to /admin/manage-events (auth required) -> Click Delete on an event -> Confirm deletion -> API fails -> See error notification and event remains in the list

features.name: Participants
features.description: View and manage participants for a selected event; displays participant name, email, and join date.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/participants (auth required) -> Select or open the event participants view -> See table of participants with Name, Email, Joined date -> Click a participant row -> See participant details
Navigate to /admin/participants (auth required) -> Select an event with no registrations -> See empty state message 'No participants found' for that event
Navigate to /admin/participants (auth required) -> Attempt to load participants -> Server returns error -> See error notification and remain on /admin/participants

routes.description: Page to list out admin events and manage them
